context_text: <A> um that is no you know everything happens for a reason and you and i got on the phone and we connected today and um now we're talking spiritually and it's i know that's why uh we you and i connected i think i i know that / <B> right / <A> um and like say you did find him and he wasn't a churchgoer but he had a christian upbringing but he hadn't been saved / <B> right / <A> if you were to go to church on sundays or wednesday nights or whenever / <B> mhm / <A> he'll eventually follow you to church you know / <B> oh / <A> and he'll eventually feel the spirit too i mean enough praying for him there's no way out i'm sorry there's no way out because / <B> okay
